message:
feat: add Genome class with git-versioned agent/routing/memory CRUD

Implements the full Genome class managing a git-versioned directory:
- git() helper for spawning git commands
- init() creates directory structure and initializes git repo
- Agent CRUD: add, update (version bump), remove, get, allAgents
- Routing rules: add, remove, match by keyword with strength sorting
- Memory CRUD delegates to MemoryStore with git commits
- loadFromDisk() reconstitutes state from existing genome directory
- initFromBootstrap() populates from bootstrap agent YAML specs

20 tests covering all functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
